title: Why Your Circadian Rhythm Changes After 40 (And What Helps You Sleep Better)
seo_title: Circadian Rhythm Changes After 40: Why and What Helps
meta_description: After 40, circadian rhythm shifts earlier, causing you to feel tired sooner and wake earlier. Learn what drives this change and how to realign your sleep cycle for better rest.
tags: Sleep, Circadian Rhythm, Menopause, Hormones, Women Over 40, Insomnia
